title: pelargonium × magniflorum
intro: Pelargonium × magniflorum, also known as Mountain Rose or Cape Rose, is a hybrid species of the Pelargonium genus, a group of flowering plants native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × magniflorum include its ability to reduce stress, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Pelargonium × magniflorum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, and can also be used in potpourri and other herbal preparations.
